ddls:
CREATE TABLE "service_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service request */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the service request */,
  "subcategory_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the subcategory of the service request */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the service request (e.g., Open, Closed) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address where the service request was made */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the service request location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the service request location */,
  "county" TEXT /* County where the service request was made */,
  "datetime" TEXT /* Date and time the service request was made */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the service request */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the service request */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of images related to the request */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the person making the request */,
  "assigned_to" INTEGER /* User who is handling the request */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date when the request was resolved */,
  "resolution_notes" TEXT /* Notes on how the request was resolved */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User who made the request */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_service_requests_subcategory_id FOREIGN KEY ("subcategory_id") REFERENCES subcategories ("subcategory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_service_requests_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_service_requests_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL of the icon representing the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subcategories" (
  "subcategory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subcategory */,
  "subcategory_name" TEXT /* Name of the subcategory */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the subcategory */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL of the icon representing the subcategory */,
  "priority_level" TEXT /* Default priority level for the subcategory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subcategory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the department */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the department */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL of the icon representing the department */,
  "priority_level" TEXT /* Default priority level for the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "request_id" INTEGER /* ID of the service request being assigned */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the request is assigned to */,
  "assign_date" TEXT /* Date the request was assigned */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the assignment (e.g., Open, Closed) */,
  "assigned_by" INTEGER /* User who assigned the request */,
  "assigned_to" INTEGER /* User handling the request */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date when the assignment was resolved */,
  "resolution_notes" TEXT /* Notes on how the assignment was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assignments_assigned_to FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_to") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assignments_assigned_by FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assignments_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assignments_request_id FOREIGN KEY ("request_id") REFERENCES service_requests ("request_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., citizen, city official) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Department the user belongs to (for city officials) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "request_id" INTEGER /* ID of the service request the comment belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "resolution_comment" INTEGER /* Indicates if the comment is related to the resolution */,
  "is_private" INTEGER /* Indicates if the comment is private (visible only to city officials) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_request_id FOREIGN KEY ("request_id") REFERENCES service_requests ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maps" (
  "map_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each map entry */,
  "request_id" INTEGER /* ID of the service request the map entry belongs to */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the service request location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the service request location */,
  "zoom_level" INTEGER /* Zoom level of the map */,
  "marker_icon_url" TEXT /* URL of the marker icon for the map entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("map_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maps_request_id FOREIGN KEY ("request_id") REFERENCES service_requests ("request_id")
)
